$comment: Versioned with the butler plugin release (plugins/butler/CHANGELOG.md). Content unchanged since 0.2.0; $id corrected in 0.3.1.
title: Butler parent task (work unit)
description: Logical shape of a parent task — one unit of work. The agent builds this, then maps it onto TickTick fields per references/template.md. Every butler-created task carries the `ai` tag so it is filterable.

title.description: Human work-unit name in sentence case. A rewrite of the Linear title, never the raw ticket title. No ticket-ID prefix, no emoji, no trailing period. See task-contract.md.

ticket.description: Linear issue identifier, e.g. ING-165. THIS IS THE IDEMPOTENCY KEY: intake searches the work list for an existing parent with this ticket before creating a new tree.

points.description: Linear estimate.value (complexity/uncertainty envelope). NEVER divided into hours. Null when unestimated.

priority.$comment: TickTick's numeric priority (none=0, low=1, medium=3, high=5), translated from Linear. Distinct from chunk-task.schema.json `priority`, which is the must/should/want commitment TAG.
priority.description: Maps to TickTick priority (none=0, low=1, medium=3, high=5). Translated from Linear priority.value (a different scale) per template.md.

project.description: Work list name from config (default 'Plate'); resolved name -> id at runtime.

ai_generated.description: Always true; drives the `ai` tag for filtering.
